input: Hi support team, I don't really know where to start because I've got a few things going on and none of them are urgent enough on their own to email separately but together they're driving me a little crazy. First and mainly, the app has been crashing on me pretty often over the last week or so, not every single time I open it, maybe one out of every four or five launches, but when it happens the screen just goes completely white and freezes for a few seconds before the whole thing closes on its own. I've tried restarting my phone, reinstalling the app, and clearing the cache, all the usual troubleshooting steps, and it still happens intermittently, which honestly makes it worse because I can never predict when it is going to happen, sometimes right in the middle of typing up a report. Second, and separately, I noticed on my last statement that I was charged twice for my monthly subscription, once on the 3rd and again on the 5th, same amount, same card ending in 7788, and I am hoping someone can look into that and refund the duplicate charge whenever you get a chance, no huge rush since I know these things take a few days to sort out. And third, kind of a random one but since I am already writing in, is there any chance dark mode is coming soon? I use the app a lot late at night and the bright white screens, when it is not crashing, are pretty rough on the eyes at that point. Not a big deal at all if it is not on the roadmap, just curious.
